'''noladaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:iatric|iatric]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-l-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iatric|iatric]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| noladaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:noladithi|noladithi]] || [[word:noladiji|noladiji]] || [[word:noladishi|noladishi]] || [[word:noladiki|noladiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:noladuthuthu|noladuthuthu]] || [[word:noladujuju|noladujuju]] || [[word:noladushushu|noladushushu]] || [[word:noladukuku|noladukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:noladuthu|noladuthu]] || [[word:noladuju|noladuju]] || [[word:noladushu|noladushu]] || [[word:noladuku|noladuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:noladufthuf|noladufthuf]] || [[word:noladufjuf|noladufjuf]] || [[word:noladufshuf|noladufshuf]] || [[word:noladufkuf|noladufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:noladethe|noladethe]] || [[word:noladeje|noladeje]] || [[word:noladeshe|noladeshe]] || [[word:noladeke|noladeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:noladothotho|noladothotho]] || [[word:noladojojo|noladojojo]] || [[word:noladoshosho|noladoshosho]] || [[word:noladokoko|noladokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:noladotho|noladotho]] || [[word:noladojo|noladojo]] || [[word:noladosho|noladosho]] || [[word:noladoko|noladoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:noladofthof|noladofthof]] || [[word:noladofjof|noladofjof]] || [[word:noladofshof|noladofshof]] || [[word:noladofkof|noladofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:noladÃŸfthÃŸf|noladÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:noladÃŸfjÃŸf|noladÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:noladÃŸfshÃŸf|noladÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:noladÃŸfkÃŸf|noladÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:noladÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|noladÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:noladÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|noladÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:noladÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|noladÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:noladÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|noladÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:noladÃŸfthÃŸf|noladÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:noladÃŸfjÃŸf|noladÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:noladÃŸfshÃŸf|noladÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:noladÃŸfkÃŸf|noladÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:noladÃŸfthÃŸf|noladÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:noladÃŸfjÃŸf|noladÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:noladÃŸfshÃŸf|noladÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:noladÃŸfkÃŸf|noladÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:noladÃḊthÃḊ|noladÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:noladÃḊjÃḊ|noladÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:noladÃḊshÃḊ|noladÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:noladÃḊkÃḊ|noladÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:noladathatha|noladathatha]] || [[word:noladajaja|noladajaja]] || [[word:noladashasha|noladashasha]] || [[word:noladakaka|noladakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:noladatha|noladatha]] || [[word:noladaja|noladaja]] || [[word:noladasha|noladasha]] || [[word:noladaka|noladaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:noladafthaf|noladafthaf]] || [[word:noladafjaf|noladafjaf]] || [[word:noladafshaf|noladafshaf]] || [[word:noladafkaf|noladafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:noladasha|noladasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:noladshÃḋsha|noladshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:noladrosha|noladrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:noladmusha|noladmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:noladyasha|noladyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonoladnkshÃḋsha|gonoladnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonoladnkrosha|gonoladnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonoladnkmusha|gonoladnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonoladnkyasha|gonoladnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nolaladasha|nolaladasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nolaladshÃḋsha|nolaladshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nolaladrosha|nolaladrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nolaladmusha|nolaladmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nolaladyasha|nolaladyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonolaladnkshÃḋsha|gonolaladnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonolaladnkrosha|gonolaladnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonolaladnkmusha|gonolaladnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonolaladnkyasha|gonolaladnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nelÃḊdasha|nelÃḊdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nelÃḊdshÃḋsha|nelÃḊdshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nelÃḊdrosha|nelÃḊdrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nelÃḊdmusha|nelÃḊdmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nelÃḊdyasha|nelÃḊdyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonelÃḊdnkshÃḋsha|gonelÃḊdnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonelÃḊdnkrosha|gonelÃḊdnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonelÃḊdnkmusha|gonelÃḊdnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonelÃḊdnkyasha|gonelÃḊdnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nolfadasha|nolfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nolfadshÃḋsha|nolfadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nolfadrosha|nolfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nolfadmusha|nolfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nolfadyasha|nolfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonolfadnkshÃḋsha|gonolfadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonolfadnkrosha|gonolfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonolfadnkmusha|gonolfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonolfadnkyasha|gonolfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
